states.name: Akatsuki
states.title: Elven Swordmaster Supreme
states.description: Akatsuki has trained all this life for this moment. He aims to prove himself the world's greatest swordmaster. What better chance than the Pandemonium? He's elated it happened 82 years sooner than he expected.

states.name: Akatsuki
states.title: Elven Swordmaster Supreme
states.description: Akatsuki justifies his behavior as "good" because while he'll challenge anyone who might best him, he argues that most of those candidates are inherently evil. So, in his quest to be the best, he'll vanquish mostly evil forces.

states.name: Akatsuki
states.title: Elven Swordmaster Supreme
states.description: Akatsuki has found a stumbling block in his quest to be the greatest swordmaster. He absolutely cannot defeat the Eternal. So, he now waits until the Crestbearer can defeat him, so he can challenge the legendary hero afterward.
